cases.prompt: 페이월 설계해줘. 업그레이드 유도랑 트라이얼 붙이고 결제 전환 올리고 싶어.

assertions.text: Produces paywall trigger rules and timing.
Provides value-framing copy and a soft/hard wall choice.
Adds trial/anchoring/decoy price layout and conversion measurement hooks.

cases.prompt: Design an upgrade prompt and run a price-point A/B to improve conversion.

assertions.text: Includes a price-point A/B and WTP research plan.
Fills the gap between what to charge (monetization-planner) and how to charge (payment-integrator).
